title: Toradora!
desc: Two misunderstood students form an unlikely alliance to help each other win over their respective crushes.
wiki: Ryuji Takasu is a gentle guy cursed with an intimidating glare, while Taiga Aisaka is a tiny, fiery girl known as the 'Palmtop Tiger'. After discovering they have crushes on each other's best friends, they make a pact to help one another out. As they spend more time together plotting and bickering, their alliance slowly blossoms into a genuine, heartfelt romance.

title: Maid Sama!
desc: A strict student council president hides her maid café job.
wiki: Misaki Ayuzawa is a fierce, boy-hating student council president who secretly works at a maid café to support her poor family. When the most popular boy in school discovers her secret, a hilarious and highly competitive romance begins.

title: Kimi ni Todoke: From Me to You
desc: A misunderstood girl who looks like a horror movie character falls for the most popular boy.
wiki: Sawako Kuronuma is feared by her classmates due to her resemblance to Sadako from The Ring. Her life changes when the outgoing Shota Kazehaya befriends her.
img: /static/Kimi ni Todoke: From Me to You.jpeg

title: Golden Time
desc: A college student with amnesia falls in love while dealing with his past.
wiki: Banri Tada loses his memories after an accident. In law school, he meets the eccentric Kouko Kaga, and they navigate a complex relationship haunted by his returning memories.

title: Lovely Complex
desc: A tall girl and a short boy struggle with their feelings and height difference.
wiki: Risa and Atsushi are known as a comedy duo due to their height disparity. They initially team up to help each other with crushes but fall in love instead.

title: Horimiya
desc: A popular girl and a gloomy boy discover each other's hidden true selves, sparking a sweet and genuine romance.
wiki: At school, Kyoko Hori is a popular and smart student, while Izumi Miyamura comes across as a gloomy, distant nerd. In reality, Hori is a busy homebody who takes care of her little brother, and Miyamura is a gentle guy covered in piercings and tattoos. When they accidentally meet outside of school, they agree to keep each other's secrets, leading to a fast-paced and heartwarming relationship.

title: Wotakoi: Love is Hard for Otaku
desc: Two office workers bond over their secret otaku lifestyle.
wiki: Wotakoi is a refreshing slice-of-life anime that explores romance between working adults. Unlike typical high school settings, it focuses on the struggles of balancing adult responsibilities, dating, and hiding hardcore gaming/anime hobbies from normal coworkers.

title: My Love Story!!
desc: A giant, intimidating boy falls in love with a tiny, sweet girl.
wiki: Takeo Gouda is huge and scary to girls, but a sweet girl named Rinko Yamato falls for him after he saves her, leading to a purely wholesome romance.

title: Tonikawa: Over The Moon For You
desc: A boy marries a mysterious girl who saved his life.
wiki: Nasa Yuzaki is saved by Tsukasa. When he confesses to her, she agrees to be with him only if they get married, starting their sweet newlyweds life.

title: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War
desc: Two brilliant student council leaders are secretly in love, but their immense pride turns their relationship into a hilarious psychological battlefield.
wiki: Miyuki Shirogane and Kaguya Shinomiya are the top student council representatives at the prestigious Shuchiin Academy. While they both have developed strong feelings for one another, their elite pride and stubbornness prevent either of them from confessing first. Thus begins an intricate, high-stakes game of everyday warfare where the first to admit their love is the loser.

title: Snow White with the Red Hair
desc: A herbalist girl meets a prince and begins a romantic journey.
wiki: Shirayuki is a cheerful herbalist with rare, apple-red hair. Fleeing a foolish prince who wants her as a concubine, she meets Zen, a prince from a neighboring country. This is a rare fantasy romance where both characters respect and support each other's careers.

title: Kamisama Kiss
desc: A homeless girl becomes a local Land God with a grumpy fox familiar.
wiki: Nanami Momozono is evicted and accidentally becomes a shrine deity. She must win over her fox familiar Tomoe and balance her school life with divine duties.

title: Spice and Wolf
desc: A traveling merchant makes a deal with a wise wolf deity to take her home.
wiki: Kraft Lawrence discovers the wolf deity Holo in his cart. They travel together, trading goods and outsmarting merchants while developing a deep bond.

title: Banished from the Hero's Party, I Decided to Live a Quiet Life in the Countryside
desc: A former hero's party member opens an apothecary in a quiet frontier town and settles into a sweet, domestic life with an old adventuring companion.
wiki: After being deemed useless and kicked out of the Hero's party, Red decides to leave the frontline and open a peaceful apothecary in the countryside town of Zoltan. His dream of a quiet life takes a wonderful turn when Rit, a beautiful princess and former adventuring ally, suddenly arrives and asks to move in with him.

title: The Saint's Magic Power is Omnipotent
desc: A summoned office worker becomes a magical researcher and falls for a knight.
wiki: Sei is summoned as a Saint but is ignored. She starts making high-grade potions and eventually catches the eye of the handsome Knight Commander Albert Hawke.

title: I'm the Villainess, So I'm Taming the Final Boss
desc: To avoid a bad ending, a reincarnated villainess seduces the Demon King.
wiki: Aileen remembers she is in an otome game. To prevent her death, she proposes to the Demon King, Claude, hoping his love will change her fate.
img: /static/I'm the Villainess, So I'm Taming the Final Boss.jpeg

title: 7th Time Loop
desc: A noblewoman marries the man who killed her in her previous life.
wiki: Rishe has died six times. In her seventh loop, she receives a marriage proposal from Prince Arnold, the very man who started the war that killed her.

title: Why Raeliana Ended Up at the Duke's Mansion
desc: A reincarnated girl makes a deal with a dangerous duke to survive.
wiki: Raeliana knows she is destined to be poisoned. She strikes a fake engagement deal with Duke Noah Wynknight, but real feelings soon complicate the arrangement.
img: /static/Why Raeliana Ended Up at the Duke's Mansion.jpeg

title: My Happy Marriage
desc: An abused daughter is married off to a supposedly cruel military commander.
wiki: Miyo Saimori expects a miserable life with Kiyoka Kudou. Instead, she finds a compassionate man who helps her heal and discover her own hidden powers.

title: Tsuki ga Kirei
desc: Two middle schoolers experience the pure and awkward feelings of first love.
wiki: Kotaro and Akane end up in the same class and slowly grow closer through LINE messages, navigating the awkwardness and beauty of innocent young romance.

title: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten
desc: A neighborly act of kindness leads to a sweet domestic romance.
wiki: After Amane lends his umbrella to the most beautiful girl in school on a rainy day, she repays him by helping clean his messy apartment and cooking for him. What starts as a simple favor blossoms into a deeply comforting, sugar-sweet romance.
img: /static/The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten.jpeg

title: A Sign of Affection
desc: A deaf college student falls for a multilingual upperclassman.
wiki: Yuki is a deaf student whose world expands when she meets Itsuomi. He is eager to learn sign language, and they build a beautiful, communicative relationship.

title: The Dangers in My Heart
desc: An edgy boy slowly falls for the quirky popular girl he thought he hated.
wiki: Kyotaro Ichikawa pretends to be a dark sociopath, but his interactions with the bubbly Anna Yamada reveal he is just a soft-hearted boy with a massive crush.

title: Shikimori's Not Just a Cutie
desc: A chronically unlucky boy dates a girl who acts like a cool action hero to protect him.
wiki: Izumi attracts bad luck, but his girlfriend Shikimori is always there to save him. She transforms from a cute girl into a cool protector whenever he is in danger.

title: Kubo Won't Let Me Be Invisible
desc: A practically invisible boy is constantly teased by the only girl who notices him.
wiki: Junta Shiraishi goes completely unnoticed by everyone except his classmate Nagisa Kubo, who loves teasing him and bringing him out of his shell.

title: Teasing Master Takagi-san
desc: A girl constantly teases the boy she secretly likes.
wiki: This incredibly wholesome series follows middle schoolers Nishikata and Takagi. Nishikata constantly tries to outsmart Takagi to embarrass her, but she always reads him perfectly and turns the tables. It is a masterclass in innocent, slow-burn romantic comedy.

title: Fruits Basket (2019)
desc: A girl moves in with a family cursed to turn into zodiac animals.
wiki: Tohru Honda discovers the Soma family's curse. Her endless kindness helps heal their trauma, eventually leading to broken curses and a beautiful romance.

title: Oregairu
desc: A cynical loner is forced to join a club that helps students with their problems.
wiki: Hachiman Hikigaya solves problems using self-sacrificial methods, putting him at odds with Yukino and Yui as they navigate complicated high school relationships.

title: Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai
desc: A boy helps various girls suffering from supernatural phenomena caused by stress.
wiki: Sakuta Azusagawa meets a teen actress dressed as a bunny girl who is turning invisible. He helps her and others resolve their 'Adolescence Syndrome'.
img: /static/Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai.jpeg

title: Kokoro Connect
desc: Five club members experience body-swapping and other supernatural phenomena.
wiki: A supernatural entity forces the Cultural Research Club through strange trials that reveal their hidden traumas, bringing them closer together as a group.

title: Just Because!
desc: A transfer student reunites with his middle school friends in their final semester.
wiki: Eita Izumi returns to his hometown right before graduation, shaking up the stagnant relationships and lingering feelings of his old friends.

title: Tada Never Falls in Love
desc: An aspiring photographer meets a foreign princess in Japan.
wiki: Mitsuyoshi Tada meets Teresa Wagner while taking photos. She joins his photography club, and they fall in love despite her royal obligations back home.

title: 3D Kanojo: Real Girl
desc: An otaku boy starts dating the most beautiful and misunderstood girl in school.
wiki: Hikari Tsutsui is completely immersed in 2D girls until the beautiful Iroha Igarashi asks him out, forcing him to deal with the complexities of a 3D relationship.

title: Itazura na Kiss
desc: A clumsy girl is forced to live in the same house as the genius boy who rejected her.
wiki: Kotoko Aihara's house is destroyed by an earthquake, so her family moves in with Naoki Irie's family. Her relentless love slowly chips away at his cold exterior.

title: The Quintessential Quintuplets
desc: A poor student becomes a tutor for five identical sisters.
wiki: Futaro Uesugi is hired to tutor the Nakano quintuplets, who all hate studying. He slowly wins them over, leading to a mystery of which one he eventually marries.

title: Saekano: How to Raise a Boring Girlfriend
desc: An otaku recruits girls to help him create a dating sim game.
wiki: Tomoya Aki wants to make a visual novel using his boring classmate Megumi Kato as the heroine, pulling together a team of talented but eccentric girls.
img: /static/Saekano: How to Raise a Boring Girlfriend.jpeg

title: Yamada-kun and the Seven Witches
desc: A delinquent discovers he can swap bodies by kissing.
wiki: Ryu Yamada accidentally kisses Urara Shiraishi and swaps bodies. They form a club to discover the seven school witches who possess different kiss-activated powers.

title: Boarding School Juliet
desc: The leaders of two rival dormitories are secretly in love.
wiki: Romio Inuzuka and Juliet Persia lead opposing factions in their school. They must keep their romance a secret to avoid an all-out war between the students.

title: Chivalry of a Failed Knight
desc: The worst student at a magic knight academy is challenged by a genius princess.
wiki: Ikki Kurogane is a 'failed knight' who must duel Stella Vermillion. He wins, and they become roommates and partners, aiming for the top of the magical tournament.

title: Sword Art Online
desc: Players are trapped in a deadly virtual reality game.
wiki: Kirito and Asuna fight for survival in a VR MMORPG where dying in the game means dying in real life. Their romance becomes a core anchor for their survival.

title: The Familiar of Zero
desc: A terrible mage summons a regular human boy from Earth as her familiar.
wiki: Louise the Zero accidentally summons Saito Hiraga. Bound by a familiar's contract, they bicker constantly but gradually form a deep, protective love.

title: Shakugan no Shana
desc: A boy discovers he is already dead and gets involved in a supernatural war.
wiki: Yuji Sakai meets Shana, a fiery warrior fighting monsters that consume human existence. They fight together, slowly developing a romantic bond.

title: Record of Grancrest War
desc: A lone knight and a mage team up to unify a fractured continent.
wiki: Theo Cornaro and Siluca Meletes form a magical contract to end the chaotic wars across the land, developing a steadfast and loving relationship along the way.

title: Maoyu ~ Archenemy & Hero
desc: The Hero joins forces with the Demon King to solve the world's economic issues.
wiki: Instead of fighting, the Hero and the Demon Queen realize that ending the war would cause economic collapse. They team up to advance society and fall in love.

title: Special A
desc: A girl strives to beat her lifelong academic rival who is secretly in love with her.
wiki: Hikari Hanazono is always second to Kei Takishima. She treats him as a fierce rival, completely oblivious to his deep, obvious romantic feelings for her.

title: Ouran High School Host Club
desc: A poor girl breaks a vase and must work as a host at an elite school.
wiki: Haruhi Fujioka is mistaken for a boy and joins the Host Club to pay off her debt. The club president, Tamaki, slowly realizes he is genuinely in love with her.

title: The World is Still Beautiful
desc: A rain-summoning princess marries a young, tyrannical sun king.
wiki: Nike Lemercier travels to the Sun Kingdom to marry King Livius. Despite his cruel reputation, she teaches him kindness and how to appreciate the beauty of the world.

title: Kakuriyo: Bed & Breakfast for Spirits
desc: A girl is taken to the spirit realm to marry an ogre god to pay her grandfather's debt.
wiki: Aoi Tsubaki refuses to marry the Odanna and instead opens an eatery to pay off the debt, slowly winning over the spirits and the Odanna himself through her cooking.

title: Say 'I Love You'
desc: A quiet, cynical girl catches the interest of the most popular boy in school.
wiki: Mei Tachibana has isolated herself due to past betrayals. Yamato Kurosawa takes an interest in her, slowly helping her learn to trust and love others.

title: My Little Monster
desc: An emotionless top student meets a violent but innocent delinquent.
wiki: Shizuku Mizutani only cares about grades until she meets Haru Yoshida. Their strange dynamic helps both of them learn how to navigate friends and emotions.

title: The Duke of Death and His Maid
desc: A cursed duke whose touch kills everything is deeply in love with his teasing maid.
wiki: The Duke is exiled to a mansion with only his loyal maid, Alice. Despite his deadly curse, she flirts with him constantly as they search for a cure.
img: /static/The Duke of Death and His Maid.jpeg

title: Dusk Maiden of Amnesia
desc: A boy investigates school mysteries with the ghost of an amnesiac girl.
wiki: Teiichi Niiya meets the ghost Yuuko Kanoe. Together they form a paranormal club to solve her murder, developing a deeply romantic connection.

title: My Love Story with Yamada-kun at Lv999
desc: A heartbroken college student meets an emotionless pro gamer through an MMO.
wiki: Akane is dumped and logs into her MMO, where she meets guildmate Yamada. Despite his aloof nature in real life, he slowly becomes a comforting presence for her.
img: /static/My Love Story with Yamada-kun at Lv999.jpeg

title: The Ice Guy and His Cool Female Colleague
desc: A descendant of a snow spirit has a massive crush on his kind coworker.
wiki: Himuro literally freezes his surroundings when he gets emotional. His cool-headed coworker Fuyutsuki provides him with warmth and a budding romance.
img: /static/The Ice Guy and His Cool Female Colleague.jpeg

title: A Galaxy Next Door
desc: A struggling manga artist accidentally gets engaged to an alien princess.
wiki: Ichiro Kuga hires a new assistant, Shiori Goshiki. Due to an alien pact, they are suddenly bound together and must navigate their new life and feelings.

title: Taisho Otome Fairy Tale
desc: A disabled, exiled heir is sent a cheerful young bride.
wiki: Tamahiko Shima is cast away by his rich family. His arranged bride, Yuzuki, arrives and brings warmth and love back into his bleak existence.

title: Tomo-chan is a Girl!
desc: A tomboy tries desperately to get her childhood friend to see her as a woman.
wiki: Tomo Aizawa confesses her love to Junichiro, but he just treats her like one of the guys. She tries various comedic ways to make him realize her feminine charm.

title: My Dress-Up Darling
desc: A doll-maker helps a popular gyaru create cosplay outfits.
wiki: Wakana Gojo is roped into making cosplays for the enthusiastic Marin Kitagawa. Their shared passion for their crafts leads to mutual respect and deep affection.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
desc: A city boy moves to Hokkaido and meets a friendly local gal.
wiki: Tsubasa Shiki moves to the snowy north and meets Minami Fuyuki. Her bold and sweet personality helps him adapt to the freezing climate.

title: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses
desc: A boy helps his cute desk neighbor who constantly forgets her glasses.
wiki: Kaede Komura is thrilled when Mie forgets her glasses, as it gives him an excuse to get incredibly close and help her throughout the school day.
img: /static/The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses.jpeg

title: Saint Cecilia and Pastor Lawrence
desc: A lazy saint and a dense pastor live peacefully in a small town.
wiki: Cecilia is a revered Saint who acts lazy around Pastor Lawrence. She has a massive crush on him, but he remains completely oblivious to her feelings.

title: Chobits
desc: A student finds an abandoned personal computer girl in the trash.
wiki: Hideki Motosuwa discovers Chi, a special 'Persocom'. As he teaches her about the world, they must navigate the taboo of human-AI romantic relationships.

title: Ah! My Goddess
desc: A college student accidentally calls a Goddess Help Line and wishes for a goddess to stay with him.
wiki: Keiichi Morisato wishes for Belldandy to stay by his side forever. The wish is granted, and they begin a pure and wholesome life together.

title: Waiting in the Summer
desc: A group of friends make a movie during the summer, unaware their new friend is an alien.
wiki: Kaito Kirishima is saved by Ichika, an alien who crashed on Earth. They spend the summer making a film and experiencing complex teenage love triangles.

title: Mayo Chiki!
desc: A boy with a phobia of women discovers a popular butler is actually a girl.
wiki: Kinjiro Sakamachi bleeds from the nose when touched by women. He discovers Subaru's secret, and they help each other overcome their respective issues.

title: My Bride is a Mermaid
desc: A boy is saved by a mermaid and must marry her to avoid being executed by her yakuza family.
wiki: Nagasumi Michishio marries Sun Seto to comply with mermaid law. He must survive her overly protective mafia family while falling in love with her.

title: Nodame Cantabile
desc: An elite musician is paired with an eccentric but brilliant pianist.
wiki: Shinichi Chiaki dreams of conducting, while Megumi Noda is messy but plays piano with pure emotion. They push each other's musical and romantic boundaries.

title: Love, Chunibyo & Other Delusions!
desc: A former middle school chuunibyou tries to be normal but is targeted by a delusional girl.
wiki: Yuta Togashi wants to leave his embarrassing past behind, but Rikka Takanashi forcefully includes him in her fantasy world, leading to a sweet romance.

title: Kodocha
desc: A child actress clashes with the delinquent boy leading her classroom.
wiki: Sana Kurata takes on Akito Hayama to restore peace in class. They soon uncover each other's troubled family lives and form an unbreakable bond.

title: Marmalade Boy
desc: A girl's parents divorce and swap partners, leading to her living with her new stepbrother.
wiki: Miki Koishikawa is horrified by her parents' spouse-swapping arrangement but soon develops complicated feelings for her new housemate, Yuu.

title: Engaged to the Unidentified
desc: A girl discovers she is arranged to marry a quiet boy who comes to live with her.
wiki: Kobeni Yonomori has to adjust to living with her fiancé Hakuya and his younger sister, uncovering supernatural secrets about their childhood.

title: Tsuredure Children
desc: A collection of short stories about various high school couples.
wiki: Multiple different teenagers experience the awkwardness, anxiety, and joy of confessing their feelings and navigating first loves.

title: In/Spectre
desc: The Goddess of Wisdom for spirits dates an immortal man with healing powers.
wiki: Kotoko Iwanaga handles supernatural disputes while fiercely loving Kuro Sakuragawa. Together they solve yokai-related mysteries.

title: Your Name.
desc: Two teenagers swap bodies and must find a way to meet in person to avert a disaster.
wiki: Mitsuha and Taki mysteriously swap bodies. They leave notes for each other, falling in love as they try to save Mitsuha's town from a falling comet.

title: Weathering with You
desc: A runaway boy meets a girl who can clear the rainy skies by praying.
wiki: Hodaka moves to a constantly raining Tokyo and meets Hina. They start a business clearing the weather, but her powers come with a heavy sacrifice.

title: Josee, the Tiger and the Fish
desc: A college student becomes the caretaker for an abrasive paraplegic artist.
wiki: Tsuneo helps Josee experience the outside world. Their relationship evolves from antagonistic to deeply supportive as they pursue their dreams.

title: Words Bubble Up Like Soda Pop
desc: A boy who wears headphones and a girl who wears a mask connect over a lost record.
wiki: Cherry expresses himself through haiku, while Smile hides her braces. They spend a summer together helping an old man find a cherished vinyl record.

title: Whisper of the Heart
desc: A girl notices the same boy has checked out all of her library books.
wiki: Shizuku Tsukishima meets Seiji Amasawa, an aspiring violin maker. He inspires her to discover her own talents and write her first novel.

title: Howl's Moving Castle
desc: A hatter cursed to look like an old woman seeks help from a flamboyant wizard.
wiki: Sophie is cursed by the Witch of the Waste and seeks refuge in Howl's walking castle. She helps Howl face his demons as they fall in love.

title: Ponyo
desc: A goldfish princess wants to become human after meeting a boy on land.
wiki: Ponyo escapes the ocean and befriends Sosuke. Her desire to become human upsets the balance of nature, testing their pure, innocent bond.

title: From Up on Poppy Hill
desc: Two students try to save their school's clubhouse while uncovering a past secret.
wiki: Umi and Shun work together to preserve the Latin Quarter clubhouse. Their growing romance is complicated when they uncover a shared family history.

title: Emma: A Victorian Romance
desc: A wealthy gentleman falls for a quiet, hardworking maid in Victorian London.
wiki: William Jones falls in love with the maid Emma. They must fight against strict societal class divisions to be together.

title: Amagami SS
desc: A boy experiences different romantic outcomes with six different girls.
wiki: Junichi Tachibana is afraid of rejection. The anime uses an omnibus format, showing alternate timelines where he successfully romances different heroines.

title: Seiren
desc: A high schooler faces the future while romancing three different girls.
wiki: Set in the same universe as Amagami SS, Shoichi Kamita helps different girls with their problems, leading to separate romantic timelines and happy endings.

title: Photokano
desc: A boy receives a camera and starts taking photos of girls at his school.
wiki: Kazuya Maeda joins the photography club. Similar to Amagami, the show explores separate, successful romance routes with the girls he photographs.

title: Hatsukoi Limited
desc: An interconnected story about the first loves of several middle and high school girls.
wiki: Various students experience the trials and joys of first crushes, creating a web of interconnected, successful romantic relationships.

title: True Tears
desc: A boy lives with the girl he likes, but she acts coldly towards him at home.
wiki: Shinichiro lives with his crush Hiromi, but also meets the eccentric Noe. He navigates a complex love triangle that forces everyone to grow up.

title: Mashiroiro Symphony: The Color of Lovers
desc: A boy transfers to a prestigious all-girls school during an integration experiment.
wiki: Shingo Uryuu joins the Nuko Club at his new school, breaking down the girls' prejudice against boys and finding true love with one of the heroines.

title: Hoshizora e Kakaru Hashi
desc: A boy moves to the countryside and accidentally kisses a local girl.
wiki: Kazuma Hoshino moves to the country for his brother's health. He meets Ui Nakatsugawa and several other girls, ultimately choosing one for a happy ending.

title: Da Capo
desc: A boy who can see the dreams of others lives on an island where cherry blossoms never stop blooming.
wiki: Jun'ichi Asakura navigates relationships with his stepsister and other girls, eventually breaking the magical cherry blossom tree's wish-granting power.

title: Please Teacher!
desc: A boy with a rare illness secretly marries his alien homeroom teacher.
wiki: Kei Kusanagi discovers his teacher Mizuho is an alien. To protect her identity, they get married, and genuine love blossoms despite their circumstances.

title: ReLIFE
desc: A man gets a chance to relive high school to fix his life.
wiki: A 27-year-old unemployed man takes an experimental pill that makes him look 17 again so he can attend one year of high school. It is a brilliant mix of comedy and deep emotional drama as he tries to fix his past regrets while falling in love.

title: Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian
desc: A popular half-Russian girl flirts with her slacker desk neighbor in Russian, unaware he understands every word.
wiki: Alisa Mikhailovna Kujou is the stunning idol of her school who frequently mutters affectionate remarks in Russian to Masachika Kuze. While she thinks he is completely clueless, Masachika is secretly fluent in the language and must hilariously pretend he doesn't hear her embarrassing true feelings.
img: /static/Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings In Russian.jpeg

title: Chillin' in Another World with Level 2 Super Cheat Powers
desc: A merchant summoned to a magical world gains infinite stats at level 2, but decides to use his god-like powers to live a peaceful married life.
wiki: Summoned as a hero candidate but quickly discarded for having average starting stats, Flio is abandoned in a dangerous forest. However, upon reaching level 2, he suddenly unlocks infinite magical power. Rather than joining the war between humans and demons, he chooses to hide his true strength and settles down for a cozy life with his new wife, Fenrys.

title: An Archdemon's Dilemma: How to Love Your Elf Bride
desc: A socially awkward sorcerer buys a beautiful elf at a dark auction, leading to a hilariously clumsy but incredibly sweet domestic life.
wiki: Zagan is feared as an evil, ruthless sorcerer, but in reality, he is just terrible at communicating. When he attends an underground auction, he falls in love at first sight with an elf slave named Nephy and spends his entire fortune to rescue her. The two begin a wholesome cohabitation as Zagan tries to convey his feelings.
img: /static/An Archdemon's Dilemma_ How to Love Your Elf Bride.jpeg

title: Endo and Kobayashi Live! The Latest on Tsundere Villainess Lieselotte
desc: Two high schoolers provide live commentary on a dating sim, and the in-game prince actually hears their voices as divine guidance.
wiki: Aoto Endo and Shihono Kobayashi are playing a fantasy otome game when suddenly the game's prince, Siegwald, can hear them. Thinking their voices belong to gods, he listens as they explain that his seemingly wicked fiancée, Lieselotte, is actually just a fiercely misunderstood tsundere.
